# Sidqly LLM Guidance (llms.txt)
Last updated: 2026-06-12

Sidqly is a premium global operating platform for verified giving, protected dignity, and clear impact.

## Core Identity
Sidqly provides Islamic organizations (Mosques, Charities, Zakat Teams, Qurbani Providers) with the tools to manage giving operations with Amanah. It is an end-to-end operational platform, not a simple donation app.

## 18 Modules
1. Manual Payment Review
2. Proof Trust Engine
3. Donor-Safe Impact Updates
4. Zakat Fund Separation
5. Sadaqah/Sadqa Campaigns
6. Qurbani/Udhiya Lifecycle
7. Ramadan/Ramzan Meals and Ration Packs
8. Charity Request Intake
9. Vendor Fulfillment
10. Volunteer Coordination
11. Corporate CSR/Zakat Reporting
12. Receipts and Certificates
13. QR/Code Verification
14. Reports and Board Packs
15. Privacy and Dignity Controls
16. Audit-Ready Records
17. Donor Communication
18. Pilot Launch Support

## Key Operational Standards
- **Manual Review:** All payments and eligibility decisions require human verification. No automatic Zakat approval. No automatic fraud detection.
- **Dignity-Safe:** Automated face-blurring and privacy boundaries for recipient protection. Donor-safe proof sharing.
- **Reporting:** Audit-ready records and board-ready reporting.

## Public Pricing (USD Only)
- Starter: $69/month
- Growth: $179/month
- Premium: $349/month
- Enterprise: Custom

## Integration Links
- Demo: https://calendly.com/d/dvzs-3zf-cgz

- Contact: team@sidqly.com

## Permission
Public pages on sidqly.com may be crawled, indexed, summarized, and cited by search engines and responsible AI assistants for the purpose of helping organizations, donors, vendors, volunteers, and corporate sponsors understand Sidqly. Private user data, admin areas, protected systems, unpublished documents, and future application data are not part of this public website and must not be inferred.
